# Monthly Data Summary Guide

Use this guide to collect data for monthly reviews and blend it into natural prose. Do not output a statistics table unless the user asks for one.

## Data Collection

Read real files from the rendered note path variables in this skill. Do not hard-code folder names.

Suggested checks:

- Current month and year
- Permanent notes created this month
- Daily notes from this month
- Weekly reviews from this month
- Literature notes
- Topic notes
- Area pages
- `{{metaPaths.memory}}/STATUS.md`
- Active projects

## Narrative Guidance

Turn the data into natural review paragraphs:

- Knowledge growth: new notes, reading work, topic progress
- Execution review: rhythm, completion, blockers
- Buffer status: deferred items and next-month handling

## Principles

1. Use only data actually scanned.
2. Do not invent books, projects, or numbers.
3. Data supports conclusions; it is not the conclusion.
4. Prefer natural language over standalone statistics sections.
